nasb.text: From the city men groan, And the souls of the wounded cry out; Yet God does not pay attention to folly.

esv.text: From out of the city the dying groan, and the soul of the wounded cries for help; yet God charges no one with wrong.

cnv.text: 有人從城裡唉哼， 受傷的人呼求， 　神卻不理會惡人的愚妄。

ccb.text: 城中传来垂死之人的呻吟， 受伤者不断呼救， 上帝却置之不理。
